claims.claim: Techstars no longer runs a Tel Aviv accelerator program. After its 2024 cohort, Techstars ('Techstars 2.0') consolidated onto high-VC-density US cities; Tel Aviv is absent from all 2025/2026 Techstars program lists (including Spring 2026). It also never ran 'quarterly' cohorts.
claims.raw_snippet: Techstars Spring 2026 accelerator programs cover a consolidated set of US-centric cities plus Anywhere; Tel Aviv is not among Techstars' 2025-2026 programs.

claims.claim: Active Israeli accelerators / startup programs in 2026: 8200 EISP (8200 for Startups, nonprofit accelerator, Feb-Jul cohort with a large annual Demo Day, 14+ cohorts); MassChallenge Israel (zero-equity, Jerusalem, annual cohort + showcases); TheHive by Gvahim (accelerator for olim/immigrant founders, Tel Aviv and Ashdod); Google for Startups (Campus Tel Aviv) and Microsoft for Startups (Israel).
claims.raw_snippet: 8200 EISP runs a Feb-Jul accelerator cohort ending in a large annual Demo Day; MassChallenge Israel is an active zero-equity accelerator in Jerusalem; TheHive by Gvahim accelerates immigrant founders.

claims.claim: Startup Nation Central restructured in early 2026 (laid off roughly 65 of ~80 staff, refocused on fewer high-impact initiatives), downsizing its live-event footprint. Startup Nation Finder remains its durable canonical database of Israeli investors, programs, and events.
claims.raw_snippet: Startup Nation Central announced (Feb 2026) it laid off about 65 of its ~80 employees and refocused on a smaller set of initiatives; Startup Nation Finder remains its core database product.

claims.claim: Geektime's standalone English edition (geektime.com) is defunct/inactive; the Hebrew geektime.co.il remains a leading Israeli tech outlet. CTech (calcalistech.com) is the dominant English-language Israeli tech outlet, so English pitches route to CTech.
claims.raw_snippet: geektime.com (English) is inactive/under construction; geektime.co.il (Hebrew) is a top Israeli tech site; CTech (calcalistech.com) is the established English-language Israeli tech outlet.

claims.claim: Product Hunt launches go live at 12:01 AM PT (00:01 PT) and run a single ~24-hour daily ranking window (Product of the Day / Week structure), so an Israeli launch day spans parts of two Israel-time calendar days. Unchanged in 2026.
claims.raw_snippet: Product Hunt launches start at 12:01 AM PT and run until 11:59 PM PT; the daily Product of the Day ranking and weekly structure remain in 2026.

claims.claim: The 8200 alumni network numbers in the tens of thousands (10,000+ is a conservative figure; EISP cites ~14,000 alumni worldwide). Unit 8200, Unit 81, and Mamram are elite IDF tech units used as founder-quality signals.
claims.raw_snippet: The 8200 Alumni Association numbers in the tens of thousands; Unit 8200, Unit 81 and Mamram are recognized elite IDF technology units.

claims.claim: Israeli tech/business outlets operating in 2026 (verified): Geektime (Hebrew, tech/startups), Calcalist Tech (Hebrew business+tech) with CTech as its English edition, Globes (Hebrew financial/enterprise), The Marker, No Camels.
claims.raw_snippet: Geektime, Calcalist/Calcalist Tech, CTech, Globes, The Marker, and No Camels are active Israeli tech/business outlets in 2026.

claims.claim: Non-regulatory illustrative figures (the skill's own approximate community sizes and pricing guidance, not external facts): Israeli founder/alumni community sizes such as 8200 Alumni 10,000+, Mamram 5,000+, Talpiot 1,000+, Israeli Tech Startups 50,000+, Tech Careers Israel 100,000+, Israel Product Managers 15,000+, DevOps Israel 3,000+, Frontend Israel 5,000+. The skill advises showing budget and pricing amounts in both USD and NIS (Convert USD to NIS, add Israeli market context), e.g. local pricing in NIS, 3 to NIS 6 figures vary. Unit *8200 / **8200** appears in bold as a unit name.
claims.raw_snippet: Israeli tech communities range from ~1,000+ to 100,000+ members; pitch budgets should show both USD and NIS; *8200 and **8200** denote the elite IDF unit. NIS 3 to NIS 6 figures are illustrative.

claims.raw_snippet: Reference URLs: https://www.geektime.co.il https://www.calcalist.co.il https://www.calcalistech.com https://www.globes.co.il https://www.themarker.com https://www.startupnationcentral.org https://innovationisrael.org.il https://innovationisrael.org.il/en
